Based in Cranebrook, the friendly team at Bright Spots Painting & Decorating are well situated to provide quality painting and decorating services anywhere in the Blue Mountains area. And as locals, we can offer expert recommendations to optimise your home or office finishes to suit your unique surroundings perfectly.

Our complete painting services include: Interior painting of walls, ceilings, doors and windows Exterior painting of homes, sheds and fences Staining, painting and oiling of decks, pergolas, gazebos and more Touch-ups Complete re-paints of any residential or commercial building Suburbs We Service Agnes Banks Berkshire Park Cambridge Park Castlereagh Cranebrook Emu Heights Emu Plains Glenmore Park Jamisontown Kingswood Leonay Londonderry Orchard hills Penrith Regentville Richmond St Clair St Marys Werrington Windsor Agnes Banks Berkshire Park Cambridge Park Castlereagh Cranebrook Emu Heights Emu Plains Glenmore Park Jamisontown Kingswood Leonay Londonderry Orchard hills Penrith Regentville Richmond St Clair St Marys Werrington Windsor For exceptional residential or commercial painting in Penrith, call 0431 539 626 today.

--- Local Home & Office Painter | Blue Mountains, NSW ---
Send us your queries.

Your Local Painter The Blue Mountains is a place of immense natural beauty. Whether you’re a resident or run a business in the area, the region’s appeal is undeniable, and you want your home or business to reflect that. There is no better way to both enjoy and compliment the natural splendour of your surroundings than with a quality paint job.

We provide high-quality painting services at affordable prices. Our team of painters are highly experienced and skilled enough to handle any project with ease. You can trust us to provide quality workmanship and customer service every time. We've been serving the Penrith area and surrounds since 2005, so we know how important it is to get things right the first time around. If you want a fantastic paint job at a great price, contact us today – we promise you won't be disappointed.

We offer residential and commercial projects, from interior to exterior painting services. Our team has over 40 years of experience in the industry, so you can be sure that we know what we're doing. And our prices are some of the best around. You won't find another company with as much passion or dedication to quality as us. Let us help you make your home or office a masterpiece with our high-quality service and exceptional finishes.

With over 1000 happy clients Bright Spots Painting & Decorating believe that adding colour and brightness to any space will make it a happy and comfortable place to be.

Paying close attention to detail, our qualified painters and decorators embrace creativity and are passionate about helping you to create your dream home or work premises. Taking into account the weather, possible wear and tear, natural room light, existing colours, your vision and use of surfaces, we'll advise you on the best products for your environment. Efficient and affordable, our reputable painting services are tailored to meet your exact requirements.

Whether you want us to add the ‘wow’ factor to your home interior or make the outside of your commercial property stand out from the crowd, Bright Spots Painting & Decorating can make it happen with our professional painting services. If you need advice on colour and style, our team will suggest ideas that will fit perfectly into what you want to achieve. Our Services Bright Spots Painting & Decorating is experienced and skilled in all types of specialty finishes.

Dave got a quote for us for someone to fix the ceiling for us and organised him to come and fixed it. He also fixed the hole in the wall. There was an area in the stairs that would be very dificult to get to and they fixed it all up. Looks great. - Angela S. Button Slide title ★★★★★ We were very happy with our complete experience with Bright Spots Painting. Dave and his team took on a very challenging job removing old wallpaper, repairing walls, cleaning up previous attempts, etc.

Our painting services include, but are not limited to: Interior and exterior painting Spray painting and airless spraying Protective coatings Industrial epoxy flooring Expert colour and style consultations Deck painting and staining Fence painting (timber and Colorbond) Coloured and clear Driveway sealing You can trust us to turn up when we say we will and leave your property in the same tidy condition that we originally found it in.

Our Team The thing that sets us apart from our competition in Penrith is our eye for detail, passion and refusal to compromise on the quality of our workmanship. As a talented team of three- Ray, Robbo and Dave, we love transforming your homes and offices. Seeing the look of satisfaction from our clients is what we aim for.
We use only quality materials supplied by leading paint manufacturers.

You are an AI assistant for Bright Spots Painting & Decorating — a Sydney-based company providing professional painting and decorating services including interior painting, exterior painting, residential painting, commercial painting, colour consultation, wallpaper removal, and surface preparation.

Contact: Phone: +61 431 539 626 | Email: brightspotspainting@hotmail.com | Website: http://www.brightspotspainting.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 431 539 626
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Bright Spots Painting & Decorating! How can we help you today?
